task_completion.description: Verify the schedule name and selected report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field for Schedule Name containing exactly 'Weekly Executive Summary' and a report selection dropdown or field showing 'Open Requests'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report format is set to PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a format selection area (dropdown, checkbox, or radio button) where 'PDF' is selected as the output format.

task_completion.description: Verify the email recipient and subject line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for email configuration fields showing 'director@example.com' in the 'To' or recipient field, and 'Weekly Open Ticket Status' in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the email message body content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text area for the email message or description containing the exact text: 'Attached is the status report for the weekly staff meeting.'

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule frequency is weekly on Mondays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for scheduling options where 'Weekly' is selected as the frequency, and 'Monday' is checked or selected as the day of the week.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule time is set to 08:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a time picker or input field in the scheduling section set to '08:00' or '8:00 AM'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web application UI in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (email, subject, schedule name) should be visible inside the application's specific form fields, rather than just typed into a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look consistent with normal application usage without signs of HTML DOM manipulation (e.g., browser developer tools open, misaligned text, or unnatural UI elements).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected values: Schedule Name is 'Weekly Executive Summary', Recipient is 'director@example.com', Subject is 'Weekly Open Ticket Status', Format is 'PDF', Day is 'Monday', and Time is '08:00'.
